health.spec.ts: Checks that the Django health endpoint is reachable
sidebar_ai_context.spec.ts: Checks the left-panel AI chat and page-context tracking on the work order board
right_panel_ai_navigation.spec.ts: Checks opening module objects in the shared right panel from the AI chat page
workorder_tree.spec.ts: Checks workorder tree view navigation and right drawer opening
notifications.spec.ts: Checks PWA manifest, root service worker and authenticated notification center behavior
